mapper.select: SELECT A.HOMPI_DIARY_COMMENT_ID AS commentId, B.NAME AS userName, A.INSERT_USER_ID AS userId, A.HOMPI_ID AS hompiId, A.DIARY_COMMENT_CONTENT AS comment, A.FIXED_YN AS fixedYn, DATE_FORMAT(A.INSERT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS insertDt FROM HOMPI_DIARY_COMMENT A JOIN USER_BASIC B ON A.INSERT_USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.DIARY_ID = #{diaryId} AND A.HOMPI_ID = #{hompiId} ORDER BY A.INSERT_DT
